summary: Comprehensive testing of Many-to-Many (M2M) employee zone assignment feature. All 13 backend API tests passed. All major UI flows verified via Playwright. Core M2M feature is working correctly - zone tags display, ✕ unassign, + add zone, KPI counts, coverage map, is_tasked badge, auto-distribute, Quick Assign, and Print buttons.

minor.issue: Route does NOT exist (405 Method Not Allowed). Must use GET /api/employees (list) and filter client-side. Not a new bug but worth noting.
update_fields filter: `if v is not None` correctly handles assigned_employee_ids=[] (empty list clears assignments). No bug confirmed via test.

ui_bugs.issue: Line 215-222: zoneEmployeeMap uses zone_code as key and OVERWRITES entries for duplicate zone_codes. If two zones share the same zone_code (data issue), the second zone's employees replace the first's in the map. Coverage calculations and zone distribution grid display will be incorrect for such duplicates.

ui_bugs.component: ZoneEmployeesTab - Zone Card Popover Add Staff
ui_bugs.issue: Zone distribution popover 'Add Staff' dropdown (line 1000) only shows UNASSIGNED employees. Cannot assign an already-assigned employee to a new zone via zone card popover. Only workaround is '+' button on employee card. Design limitation, not critical.

54 out of 60 zones in test session don't have 'assigned_employee_ids' in MongoDB (pre-M2M zones). Frontend uses || [] fallback and works correctly. New sessions cloned via _clone_zones_from_source also don't pre-populate the field (raw dict creation). The field is only created on first assignment.

integration_issues.issue: Section does not show when ALL employees are assigned - this is CORRECT behavior (conditional rendering). Verified: when 0 unassigned employees exist, section is hidden. When employees are unassigned, section appears.

issues: 'Clear all assignments' button is only accessible via auto-distribute popover (مسح جميع التعيينات الحالية). No direct clear-all button in toolbar. Minor UX consideration.

missing_data_testids: SelectTrigger '+' button to add zone to assigned employee card - no data-testid
'مسح جميع التعيينات الحالية' (Clear all) button inside auto-distribute popover - no data-testid
Zone popover add-staff SelectTrigger - no data-testid
Individual SVG polygons in coverage map - no data-testid (inline fill attribute, not CSS class)
action_items: MEDIUM: Fix zoneEmployeeMap to MERGE duplicate zone_codes instead of overwriting: `map[z.zone_code] = [...(map[z.zone_code] || []), ...(z.assigned_employee_ids || []).map(id => employees.find(e => e.id === id)).filter(Boolean)]`
MEDIUM: Ensure _clone_zones_from_source (sessions.py:184) includes 'assigned_employee_ids': [] in zone template dicts for new sessions
LOW: Consider adding data-testid to: '+' add-zone SelectTrigger, clear-all button, zone-popover add-staff trigger
LOW: Zone card popover add-staff could show ALL employees not yet assigned to THAT zone (not just globally unassigned)
critical_code_review_comments: BUG: zoneEmployeeMap in ZoneEmployeesTab.jsx (line 215-222) overwrites duplicate zone_codes instead of merging. Fix: concat instead of replace when same zone_code.

DATA MIGRATION: 54/60 zones in existing test session lack assigned_employee_ids field in MongoDB. Sessions created before M2M feature need field initialized. Suggest one-time migration: db.map_sessions.update_many({}, {$set: {'zones.$[z].assigned_employee_ids': []}}, arrayFilters=[{'z.assigned_employee_ids': {$exists: False}}]).
SESSION CLONING: _clone_zones_from_source does not include assigned_employee_ids: [] in zone template (sessions.py:184). Add it to ensure consistent schema for new sessions.
DESIGN: QuickAssignSearch (line 79-81) only uses unassignedEmployees. Already-assigned employees cannot be added to more zones via Quick Assign or zone popover. Only via '+' on employee card.

success_rate.frontend: 92% (all core features working, 2 medium design issues noted)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Test session 6eb12c13 used. Employee e0dadb33 (بسام اسماعيل غزاوي) with is_tasked=true was used. Zone assignments modified during tests were restored.
context_for_next_testing_agent: M2M employee zone assignment feature is working end-to-end. The only 1 active plazas employee (e0dadb33) is already assigned to multiple zones (ف-0-37, ف-0-37 duplicate, م-0-47). The test session has 54 zones without assigned_employee_ids field (pre-migration). Frontend handles this with || [] fallback. The zoneEmployeeMap has a potential bug with duplicate zone_codes. The '⚡ مكلف' badge for is_tasked=true is showing correctly. The panel handle toggle, zone card popovers, coverage map, KPIs, auto-distribute, and print all work. Quick Assign shows zones but no unassigned employee dropdown when all employees are assigned.

rca_of_issues.zoneEmployeeMap_overwrite: ZoneEmployeesTab.jsx line 215-222: The map uses zone_code as key. When two zones have the same zone_code (can happen if zone data has duplicates), `forEach` overwrites the previous entry. Fix: use array concat pattern: `map[z.zone_code] = [...(map[z.zone_code] || []), ...newEmps]`. Impact: Zone distribution grid shows wrong employee count for duplicate-code zones, coverage percentage may be incorrect.
rca_of_issues.missing_field_existing_zones: MongoDB documents for zones created before the M2M feature don't have 'assigned_employee_ids'. Pydantic model has default_factory=list but this only applies to new object creation, not MongoDB reads. Since the session's zones array is stored as raw dicts in MongoDB (not through Pydantic deserialization on read), old zones lack the field. Fix: one-time MongoDB migration OR add assigned_employee_ids to zones_template in session cloning.
